home.heroSubtitle: Transform your activity into a minimal poster-inspired shirt design — built from your route, your record, and your moment.

step1.title: Import Activity
step1.description: Connect your run and bring your movement data into MOVIATA.

step2.title: Build the Design
step2.description: Turn route, date, and distance into a clean visual composition.

step3.title: Wear Your Record
step3.description: Preview the piece and make your movement part of your style.

cta.tagline: From your stride to your style.

activityType.title: CHOOSE YOUR MOVEMENT
activityType.subtitle: Define your path. Select the rhythm that matches your energy today.

path.description: Print your exact route on a shirt. Precision GPS data turned into a wearable map of your movement.

motion.description: Edit and visualize your footage. Turn video into a graphic design printed on your shirt.

start.title: CONNECT YOUR DATA
start.subtitle: Import your movement and turn it into a wearable design.

strava.label: Strava
strava.title: CONNECT STRAVA
strava.description: Sync your recent activities instantly from your Strava account.

gpx.label: File
gpx.title: UPLOAD GPX
gpx.description: Upload your route manually as a GPX file.

errors.fileSize: File size must be 10MB or less.
errors.parseFailed: Failed to parse the GPX file.
errors.stravaAuthFailed: An error occurred while starting Strava authentication.

design.scrollHint: Scroll to zoom · Drag to move

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Edit the preview on the left in real time.

instagram.title: Instagram
instagram.description: Add your account and optionally one friend.

map.title: Map
map.description: Show or hide the background map.

contours.title: Contours
contours.description: Show contour lines for terrain-based map styling.

routePoints.title: Start / End Points
routePoints.description: Show minimal route markers on the map.

confirm.title: Confirm Your Order

productDescription.title: Product Description
productDescription.text: This shirt transforms your movement into a minimal visual record. Each design is generated from your real activity data, including your route, distance, and date.

refund.title: Refund & Exchange
refund.text1: Each item is made to order based on your custom activity design, so refunds or exchanges are not available for change of mind or incorrect size selection.
refund.text2: If your item arrives damaged or defective, please contact us within 7 days of delivery with photos. After review, we will provide a replacement or refund.

confirm.heading: Get your movement on a shirt
confirm.subtitle: A minimal wearable record of your route, distance, and day.

sizeGuide.title: Size Guide
sizeGuide.note: Measurements may vary by 1–2 cm depending on production.

header.label: MOVIATA × Strava
header.heading: Pick a movement you want to keep.
header.description: Your latest Strava activities are ready. Pick one activity and move directly into the design workspace.

loading.label: Loading your activities...
loading.heading: Fetching the latest data from Strava

notConnected.label: Connection required
notConnected.heading: Connect your Strava account first
notConnected.description: Once your account is connected, your recent activities will appear here automatically.

empty.label: No activities found
empty.heading: Your activity list is currently empty
empty.description: Record a new activity in Strava and come back here to turn it into a poster or apparel design.

error.label: Error
error.heading: Something went wrong while loading activities
error.fallback: Please try again in a moment.

card.routeMissing: Route data is missing for this activity.
card.zeroDistance: Distance is zero — activity cannot be designed.

routeHints.vertical: Vertical flow · Works well on A3
routeHints.long: Long route · High density, bold print
routeHints.noDesign: No route data · Can't be designed
